name: Gethsemane's Bitter Cup
oracleText:
Target creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn.
You gain 2 life and scry 2.
flavorText: "Not my will, but thine, be done." — Luke 22:42
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Grotto of the Agony" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, The Grotto of the Agony
classics.sourceNotes: This is a direct Gethsemane match.
